mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT wp.work_progress_code AS workProgressCode, wp.proc_code, wp.work_instruct_detail_code, wp.proc_num, wp.progress, wp.instruct_quantity, wp.ent_member_code, wp.error_quantity, p.proc_class_code, p.proc_name, wi.work_name, wid.prod_code, pr.prod_name, pr.unit, wp.input_quantity, wp.prod_quantity
FROM work_progress wp JOIN proc p ON (wp.proc_code = p.proc_code) JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON (wid.work_instruct_detail_code = wp.work_instruct_detail_code) JOIN work_instruct wi ON (wi.work_instruct_code = wid.work_instruct_code) JOIN prod_common pr ON (pr.prod_code = wid.prod_code)
WHERE p.proc_class_code = 'PC1' AND wp.instruct_quantity > 0
ORDER BY wp.work_instruct_detail_code , wp.proc_num

SELECT DISTINCT tp.test_process_code, wp.work_progress_code, wp.progress, tf.test_flow_code, wid.work_instruct_detail_code, wid.prod_code, p.prod_name, pr.proc_class_code, t.test_name, tp.test_quantity, tf.pass_criteria, tf.test_num, tp.error_quantity, wp.instruct_quantity, tp.test_date, tp.registration_date, tp.status, tp.emp_code, tp.note
FROM work_progress wp LEFT OUTER JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON wid.work_instruct_detail_code = wp.work_instruct_detail_code LEFT OUTER JOIN prod_common p ON wid.prod_code = p.prod_code LEFT OUTER JOIN proc pr ON pr.proc_code = wp.proc_code JOIN test_flow tf ON pr.proc_code = tf.proc_code LEFT OUTER JOIN test t ON tf.test_code = t.test_code LEFT OUTER JOIN test_process tp ON (tp.work_progress_code = wp.work_progress_code AND tp.test_flow_code =tf.test_flow_code)
WHERE wp.work_progress_code = #{workProgressCode}
ORDER BY tf.test_num , wp.work_progress_code

SELECT 'TEST-PROCESS-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_process_code, 14))) + 1, 1)
FROM test_process
WHERE test_process_code LIKE 'TEST-PROCESS-%'
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TEST-PROCESS-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_process_code, 14))) + 1, 1)
FROM test_process
WHERE test_process_code LIKE 'TEST-PROCESS-%'
INSERT INTO test_process ( test_process_code, test_date, test_quantity, test_flow_code, error_quantity, note, ent_member_code, work_progress_code, status
) VALUES ( #{testProcessCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate, #{testQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{testFlowCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{note, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entMemberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workProgressCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT 'TEST-PROCESS-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_process_code, 14))) + 1, 1)
FROM test_process
WHERE test_process_code LIKE 'TEST-PROCESS-%'
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_process SET test_date = sysdate, test_quantity = #{testQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, test_flow_code = #{testFlowCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_quantity = #{errorQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, note = #{note, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ent_member_code = #{entMemberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
WHERE test_process_code = #{testProcessCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT wp.work_progress_code as workProgressCode, wp.proc_code, wp.work_instruct_detail_code, wp.proc_num, wp.instruct_quantity, wp.ent_member_code, wp.progress, p.proc_class_code, p.proc_name, wi.work_name, wid.prod_code, pr.prod_name, pr.unit, wp.input_quantity, wp.prod_quantity
FROM work_progress wp JOIN proc p ON (wp.proc_code = p.proc_code) JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON (wid.work_instruct_detail_code = wp.work_instruct_detail_code) JOIN work_instruct wi ON (wi.work_instruct_code = wid.work_instruct_code) JOIN prod_common pr ON (pr.prod_code = wid.prod_code)
WHERE p.proc_class_code = 'PC1' AND wp.instruct_quantity > 0
AND wi.work_name LIKE '%' || #{inputVal} || '%'
AND pr.prod_name LIKE '%'|| #{inputVal} || '%'
ORDER BY wp.work_instruct_detail_code , wp.proc_num

SELECT work_progress_code, proc_code, work_instruct_detail_code, proc_num FROM work_progress
WHERE work_instruct_detail_code = #{workInstructDetailCode} AND proc_num = #{currentProcNum} + 1

SELECT prod_name, unit, standard, prod_code
FROM prod_common
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(prod_code , 6))

select proc_code, proc_name, fac_class_code, proc_class_code, ent_member_code
FROM proc
WHERE proc_class_code = 'PC1'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(proc_code , 6))

SELECT tf.test_num, tf.test_flow_code, tf.test_code, tf.pass_criteria, tf.proc_code, p.proc_code, p.proc_class_code, tf.note
FROM test_flow tf JOIN proc p ON tf.proc_code = p.proc_code JOIN test t ON tf.test_code = t.test_code
WHERE p.proc_class_code = 'PC1' AND tf.proc_code = #{proc_code}
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(tf.test_flow_code , 11))

select test_code, test_name, test_item, test_item_unit, note FROM test
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_code , 6))
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TEST-FLOW-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_flow_code, 11))) + 1, 1)
FROM test_flow
WHERE test_flow_code LIKE 'TEST-FLOW-%'
INSERT INTO test_flow ( test_num, test_flow_code, test_code, pass_criteria, proc_code)
VALUES ( #{testNum}, #{testFlowCode}, #{testCode}, #{passCriteria}, #{procCode})
mapper.select:
SELECT main_code, sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code
WHERE main_code IN ('PC', 'FD')

SELECT DISTINCT tp.test_process_code, wp.work_progress_code, wp.progress, tf.test_flow_code, wid.work_instruct_detail_code, wid.prod_code, p.prod_name, pr.proc_class_code, t.test_name, tp.test_quantity, tf.pass_criteria, tf.test_num, tp.error_quantity, wp.instruct_quantity, tp.test_date, tp.registration_date, tp.status, tp.emp_code, tp.note
FROM work_progress wp LEFT OUTER JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON wid.work_instruct_detail_code = wp.work_instruct_detail_code LEFT OUTER JOIN prod_common p ON wid.prod_code = p.prod_code LEFT OUTER JOIN proc pr ON pr.proc_code = wp.proc_code JOIN test_flow tf ON pr.proc_code = tf.proc_code LEFT OUTER JOIN test t ON tf.test_code = t.test_code LEFT OUTER JOIN test_process tp ON (tp.work_progress_code = wp.work_progress_code AND tp.test_flow_code =tf.test_flow_code)
WHERE wp.work_progress_code = #{workProgressCode}
ORDER BY tf.test_num , wp.work_progress_code

SELECT DISTINCT p.proc_code, p.proc_name, p.note, f.fac_class_code, p.proc_class_code
FROM proc p JOIN fac f ON p.fac_class_code = f.fac_class_code
AND UPPER(proc_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{inspectVO.keyword}) || '%'
AND proc_name LIKE '%' || #{inspectVO.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(p.proc_code , 6))
